title: Goodbye, Rope! Hi, Twine! (Farmer Delight)
description: This Resource Pack makes Farmer Delight Rope look like Twine :D
body: ![The Twine from Farmer Delight and Rope from Supplementaries and + No More Duplicates :)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7946ba98818aa707de4006194f3db18d3f2f5d59.png)This Resource Pack makes Farmer Delight Rope look like Twine :D I did this on purpose to avoid Duplicating Items from Mods. You can free use this Resource Pack in your Modpacks, if you use mods like Farmer's Delight, Supplementaries or Quark.
